mapper.update: UPDATE PAYMENT SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE PAYMENT SET status = '환불완료', canceled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, user_name, membership_id, mp_id, gym_id, trainer_id, payment_date, payment_price, payment_fee, method, status, payment_type, canceled_at, reason FROM PAYMENT WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, user_id, user_name, membership_id, mp_id, gym_id, trainer_id, payment_date, payment_price, payment_fee, method, status, payment_type, canceled_at, reason FROM PAYMENT WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT user_name AS clientName, DATE_FORMAT(payment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS paymentDate, DATE_FORMAT(payment_date, '%H:%i') AS paymentTime, payment_price AS price, payment_fee AS platformFee, (payment_price - payment_fee) AS netAmount, method, status FROM PAYMENT WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND payment_type = 'PT' ORDER BY payment_date DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT user_name AS clientName, DATE_FORMAT(payment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS paymentDate, DATE_FORMAT(payment_date, '%H:%i') AS paymentTime, DATE_FORMAT(payment_date, '%Y-%m') AS settlementMonth, payment_price AS price, payment_fee AS platformFee, (payment_price - payment_fee) AS netAmount, method, status FROM PAYMENT WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND payment_type = 'PT' AND status = '결제완료' ORDER BY payment_date DESC

SELECT id, user_id, user_name, membership_id, mp_id, gym_id, trainer_id, payment_date, payment_price, payment_fee, method, status, payment_type, canceled_at, reason FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY id DESC
